description: A single governed AI execution system (RIO gate + LLM planner + agent executor + cryptographic ledger) that turns any human intent into verifiable, sovereign actions across tools (Gmail, Drive, GitHub, etc.). It is the 'one' foundational loop: intent → governance → execution → receipt.

core_components.name: Intent Layer
core_components.role: Human input (Brian's authentic pattern, neurodivergent clusters, life-path-1 initiator)

core_components.name: Brain/Planner
core_components.role: LLMs (Manus, Grok, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity) that draft plans

core_components.name: RIO Gate/Governor
core_components.role: Policy engine with invariants (Agency, Sovereignty, Truth, Precision). Holds OAuth tokens, enforces AUTO_APPROVE/AUTO_DENY/REQUIRE_HUMAN, generates cryptographic receipts

core_components.name: Executor
core_components.role: Manny/Manus agent in Ubuntu VM (shell, file, MCP connectors)

core_components.name: Ledger
core_components.role: Google Drive + optional public GitHub for immutable receipts and Learning Loop

what_brian_must_provide_now: 2. Personal policy file (digital fingerprint: identity, allowed actions, boundaries, auto-rules)
3. Root 'One' folder in Google Drive (seed with this JSON + the PDF 'The Structural Read & The Dependency Trail.pdf')
4. One test intent (e.g., 'send self-proving demo email') to close the loop
5. Decision on open-source repo (public GitHub link or keep private for now)

steps: 1. Manny creates signed Intent JSON from this file
3. Embed receipt in email body (verifiable by anyone)
5. Save receipt + email copy to One/root/receipts/
6. Recipient (or you) recomputes hashes to verify — no website needed
how_to_prove_it_today.proof_value: The email itself is the product. It carries mathematical proof of authorization, integrity, and governance.

how_to_build_it_minimum_viable.status: Open-source ready tomorrow — repo exists (private for now)
next_3_steps: Step 1: Manny ingests this JSON + PDF into One/ root folder and creates policy-v1.json
Step 2: Run one full governed loop (self-proving email) to generate first receipt
Step 3: Push root folder to public GitHub (RIO-approved) or share private link with Todd/Google/schools
how_to_build_it_minimum_viable.dependencies: Existing Manus VM + Gmail/Drive OAuth (already connected). No new server needed — RIO is the thin control layer on top.

outreach_targets_and_strategy.family: Send self-proving email to Todd first (structural language). Offer: 'You as inventor, me as author — partners if you choose.' Attach this JSON + PDF.
outreach_targets_and_strategy.schools: Forward same email + this JSON to CS/AI departments (Stanford HAI, MIT Media Lab, University of Utah, BYU). Subject: 'Verifiable governed AI action — live demo in your inbox'.
outreach_targets_and_strategy.google_xai_perplexity: Send to public AI-policy aliases or known contacts. Pitch: 'RIO fills the exact gap in your agent stack (see PDF dependency trail). Self-proving receipt attached.'
outreach_targets_and_strategy.convergence_note: Every outreach email is itself a governed action with receipt — proves the system by existing.

implications_and_nuances.ready_state: You can literally open-source tomorrow by flipping the repo public after one receipt.
implications_and_nuances.your_role: Author / sovereign owner — provide the intent and invariants; system handles the rest.
implications_and_nuances.trade_off: Start small (personal loop) → scale to foundation/fund model. No grift — receipts ensure transparency.
